rationale: Six exact official MTA rows establish realized QBNR service-start dates and one new current route identity per row. Each row has multiple bounded treatment members and is reviewed as a Queens Bus Network Redesign route-redesign bundle; predecessor, replacement, alternative, and timetable references remain treatment text or reviewed context only.

clauses.label: Q20 college point jamaica connection
clauses.source_quote: The Q20 will connect College Point and Jamaica using the existing Q20A routing along 20 Av and Main St.
clauses.description: Source-stated Q20 college point jamaica connection treatment.

clauses.label: Q20 q20b replacement
clauses.source_quote: Existing Q20B service on 14 Av will be discontinued and replaced by the Q76 .

clauses.label: Q20 jamaica avenue approach
clauses.source_quote: To the south, the Q20 will approach Downtown Jamaica via Jamaica Av instead of Sutphin Blvd.
clauses.description: Source-stated Q20 jamaica avenue approach treatment.

clauses.source_quote: Get more details on Q20 service.
clauses.review_rationale: Source context, continuity, navigation, or another route reference; no treatment or route edge.

clauses.source_quote: View the new Q20 timetable.
clauses.review_rationale: Source context, continuity, navigation, or another route reference; no treatment or route edge.

clauses.label: Q45 all day frequent service
clauses.source_quote: The new Q45 will provide all-day frequent service along Union Tpke
clauses.description: Source-stated Q45 all day frequent service treatment.

clauses.label: Q45 direct connection
clauses.source_quote: and create a new direct connection between 188 St and Kew Gardens.
Get more details on Q45 service.

clauses.label: Q63 northern boulevard connection
clauses.source_quote: The new Q63 will run the length of Northern Blvd between Flushing and Long Island City.
clauses.description: Source-stated Q63 northern boulevard connection treatment.

clauses.label: Q63 limited stops
clauses.source_quote: The new Q63 will make limited stops on Northern Blvd between Main St and 114 St and on Northern Blvd and Jackson Av between 49 St and Court Square.
For local service between Main St and 114 St, take the Q66 . For local service between 49 St and Court Sq, take the Q101 .
clauses.review_rationale: Source context, continuity, navigation, or another route reference; no treatment or route edge.

clauses.label: Q75 q30 short trip replacement
clauses.source_quote: The new Q75 will replace existing Q30 short trips between Queensborough Community College and Jamaica.
clauses.description: Source-stated Q75 q30 short trip replacement treatment.

clauses.label: Q75 limited stops
clauses.source_quote: The Q75 will make limited stops on Utopia Pkwy.
For local service, take the Q31 .

clauses.label: Q86 q5 q85 branch combination
clauses.source_quote: The new Q86 will combine the existing Q5 and Q85 Rosedale branches, creating new connections between Rosedale and Laurelton and bringing service further south.
clauses.description: Source-stated Q86 q5 q85 branch combination treatment.

clauses.label: Q86 limited stops
clauses.source_quote: The Q86 will make limited stops on Merrick Blvd between Archer Av and Springfield Blvd.
For local service, take the Q5 .
